info.title: Diocese of Kalookan API
info.description: Backend API for the Diocese Sacramental Management System

get.description: Retrieve comprehensive dashboard statistics including summary counts, recent bookings, and breakdowns by status and type. Requires admin privileges.
Retrieve a paginated list of all users with optional filtering. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Create a new user account. Requires admin privileges.

400.description: Invalid input or email already exists

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific user. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Update user information. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description: Soft delete a user by setting isActive to false. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all parishes with optional filtering. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by parish name or address

post.description: Create a new parish. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific parish. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Update parish information. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description: Soft delete a parish by setting isActive to false. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieve system configurations for a specific parish. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Create or update system configuration for a parish. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description: Delete a system configuration. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all bookings with optional filtering. Requires admin privileges.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific booking. Requires admin privileges.

put.description: Update the status of a booking. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description: Delete a booking. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all mass intentions with optional filtering. Requires admin privileges.

200.description: List of mass intentions retrieved successfully

put.description: Update the status of a mass intention. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Only diocese_staff and diocese_admin can create parishes

get.summary: Get a specific parish by ID

put.description: Diocese staff can update any parish; parish_admin can update only their assigned parish

delete.description: Only diocese_staff and diocese_admin can delete parishes
Only diocese_staff and diocese_admin can hard delete parishes

get.summary: Search parishes by name or location

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term for name or address

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Service to filter by (e.g., baptism, wedding, confirmation, mass-intention)

200.description: List of parishes offering the service

intentionDetails.example: For the souls of departed family members

get.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can access

post.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can create

notes.example: Special Sunday mass for feast day

get.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can access

put.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can update

delete.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can delete

get.summary: Generate PDF list of mass intentions
get.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can generate PDFs

parameters.name: parishId
parameters.description: Parish ID to generate PDF for

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Specific date to filter mass intentions (YYYY-MM-DD)

200.description: PDF file containing mass intention list

post.summary: Send notification emails to assigned priests and parish staff
post.description: Only authorized personnel (parish_admin, parish_staff, diocese_staff, diocese_admin) can send notifications

parameters.name: parishId
parameters.description: Parish ID to send notifications for

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Specific date to filter mass intentions (YYYY-MM-DD)

message.example: Mass intention notifications sent successfully to 3 recipients

blackoutDates.description: Dates when bookings are not allowed

bookingCutoffDays.description: Number of days before event when bookings close

maxAdvanceBookingDays.description: Maximum days in advance for booking

cutoffTime.description: Daily cutoff time for same-day bookings

requiredDocuments.description: List of required documents for bookings

tags.name: Mass Intentions
tags.description: Mass intention booking and management endpoints

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative endpoints for system management including dashboard, user management, parish management, system configuration, and booking oversight
